utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Ooh , oh no ! I have to go ! I have a massage appointment .

utterances.speaker: Eric
utterances.text: Oh no , stay here we will keep doing this . I will pay you .

utterances.text: No , I got in trouble for that before . I will see you later .

utterances.text: Absolutely . I love the way you kiss .
